# CodeBuddy Adapter

This adapter uses a minimal compatibility convention. Prefer `AGENTS.md` and `core/skills/` from the project root.
If the current CodeBuddy version recognizes `.codebuddy/skills/` or `.codebuddy/rules/`, use the generated files in this directory. Otherwise, fall back to `AGENTS.md`.
